title: Transition Diagram of a Stochastic Matrix
description: A visual representation of a 3-state Markov Chain showing the possible transitions and their probabilities as defined by a stochastic matrix P.
relationships: P_AB: Probability of transitioning from Sunny to Cloudy
P_AC: Probability of transitioning from Sunny to Rainy
P_BA: Probability of transitioning from Cloudy to Sunny
P_BC: Probability of transitioning from Cloudy to Rainy
P_CA: Probability of transitioning from Rainy to Sunny
P_CB: Probability of transitioning from Rainy to Cloudy
